methodsAttempted.query: University of Pennsylvania generative AI policy students
methodsAttempted.notes: DuckDuckGo browser search. Found ISC AI guidance, CETLI pages, Almanac record, Wharton policy.
Verified all discovered URLs with web_fetch. isc.upenn.edu/security/AI-guidance HTTP 200. cetli.upenn.edu pages HTTP 200. almanac.upenn.edu HTTP 200. academy.wharton.upenn.edu HTTP 200.
Followed links from CETLI and Wharton pages to Penn Academic Integrity code.
All sources on official upenn.edu domain or official subdomains (isc, cetli, almanac, catalog, academy.wharton).

summary: UPenn discovery found 6 verified sources spanning university-wide AI guidance (ISC), teaching guidance (CETLI), formal policy (Almanac), school-level policy (Wharton), and academic integrity code. Strong institutional coverage.
